name: teamspeak
description: Bridge KinBot with a TeamSpeak server via the local ts-bot WebSocket API. Adds a 'teamspeak' channel adapter (chat + TTS) and tools to control the bot (move, speak, send chat, status).
author: MarlBurroW

wsUrl.label: ts-bot WebSocket URL
wsUrl.description: URL of the local ts-bot WebSocket endpoint. Default: ws://127.0.0.1:8080/ws

defaultVoice.label: Default TTS voice (optional)
defaultVoice.description: Voice identifier passed to the TTS pipeline (e.g. ff_siwis). Leave empty to use the ts-bot server default.

ttsMaxChars.label: TTS soft limit (chars)
ttsMaxChars.description: Replies longer than this are truncated to a short voice notice; the full text is sent to chat. Set to 0 to disable the limit.

enableTtsOnPublic.label: Speak replies in public channels
enableTtsOnPublic.description: When ON, public channel replies are spoken AND copied to chat. When OFF, public channel replies are chat-only. Private messages are always chat-only.

ttsTooLongNotice.label: TTS truncation notice
ttsTooLongNotice.description: Short sentence spoken when the reply is too long for TTS. The full text is sent to chat as well.
ttsTooLongNotice.default: J'ai répondu en chat, c'était trop long pour le vocal.

reconnectMaxBackoffMs.label: Max reconnect backoff (ms)
reconnectMaxBackoffMs.description: Upper bound for exponential reconnect backoff to the ts-bot WebSocket.

fields.name: wsUrl
fields.label: ts-bot WebSocket URL
fields.description: URL of the local ts-bot WebSocket endpoint.

fields.name: defaultVoice
fields.label: Default TTS voice
fields.description: Voice identifier passed to the TTS pipeline. Leave empty to use the ts-bot server default.

fields.name: ttsMaxChars
fields.label: TTS soft limit (chars)
fields.description: Replies longer than this are truncated to a short voice notice; full text is also sent to chat. Set to 0 to disable.

fields.name: enableTtsOnPublic
fields.label: Speak replies in public channels
fields.description: When enabled, public channel replies are spoken AND copied to chat. Private messages are always chat-only.

fields.name: ttsTooLongNotice
fields.label: TTS truncation notice
fields.default: J'ai répondu en chat, c'était trop long pour le vocal.
fields.description: Short sentence spoken when a reply is too long for TTS.

fields.name: reconnectMaxBackoffMs
fields.label: Max reconnect backoff (ms)
fields.description: Upper bound for exponential reconnect backoff to the ts-bot WebSocket.
